display.purpose: Hero headline only. The shop name at maximum scale and weight.

headline.purpose: Section titles that introduce major content areas.

title.purpose: Product names, contact values, navigation text.

body.purpose: Paragraph text, descriptions, review snippets. Bilingual reading.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Teal-tinted lift on product card hover.

shadows.name: button-glow
shadows.purpose: Gold glow on primary button hover.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions. Ease-out-quart.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Intersection Observer entrance. translateY(24px) to rest.

motion.name: stagger-delay
motion.purpose: Sequential fade-in delay for grouped elements.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile. Single-column, compact spacing, icon-only nav CTA.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Tablet. Two-column hero, stacked about section.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The call-to-action. Sitamarhi Gold pill with phone icon.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Mukta', system-ui, sans-serif; background: oklch(0.72 0.15 80); color: oklch(0.18 0.012 55); border: none; cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.16 80); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px oklch(0.72 0.15 80 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Teal-tinted transparent pill for Directions and navigation.
components.html: Directions
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Mukta', system-ui, sans-serif; background: oklch(0.95 0.01 175 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.95 0.01 175); border: 1px solid oklch(0.95 0.01 175 / 0.25); cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.01 175 / 0.18); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Content card for product categories. Lifts on hover.
components.html:
🔌

Electrical Fittings

इलेक्ट्रिकल फिटिंग्एस

MCB, DB boxes, wires, cables, switches, and sockets. Everything for your wiring needs.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.99 0.005 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.010 80); border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.75rem 1.5rem; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px oklch(0.30 0.06 175 / 0.08); } .ds-card-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; background: oklch(0.93 0.04 55); } .ds-card-name { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 55); margin: 0 0 0.1rem; } .ds-card-hindi { font-size: 0.78rem; color: oklch(0.58 0.012 55); margin: 0 0 0.6rem; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: oklch(0.40 0.015 55); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Fixed top navigation. Transparent on hero, blurred cream on scroll.
components.html:
SK
S. K. ElectronicsWholesale Electrical
+91 90654 73333
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0.875rem 2rem; background: oklch(0.97 0.008 80 / 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(0.88 0.010 80); } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-nav-mark { width: 38px; height: 38px; background: oklch(0.72 0.15 80); border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: oklch(0.20 0.04 80); font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.95rem; font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-nav-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.2; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 55); font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-sub { font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.7; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 55); } .ds-nav-cta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.72 0.15 80); color: oklch(0.20 0.04 80); padding: 0.55rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Mukta', system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; min-height: 44px; justify-content: center; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.16 80); }

components.name: Review Card
components.description: Customer review with stars, text, optional photos, and author.
components.html:
8 months ago

Very professional service. They patiently answered all my questions and helped me choose the best product.

M
Mukesh Prasad
components.css: .ds-review { background: oklch(0.99 0.005 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.010 80); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.25rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.6rem; } .ds-review-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .ds-review-stars { display: flex; gap: 1px; } .ds-review-star { color: oklch(0.72 0.15 80); display: flex; } .ds-review-time { font-size: 0.7rem; color: oklch(0.58 0.012 55); } .ds-review-text { font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.55; color: oklch(0.40 0.015 55); margin: 0; } .ds-review-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 0.5rem; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.010 80); } .ds-review-avatar { width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.92 0.04 175); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(0.30 0.06 175); } .ds-review-name { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 55); }

components.name: Hero Rating Block
components.description: The trust anchor. Large gold number, five stars, review count.
components.css: .ds-hero-rating { background: oklch(0.95 0.01 175 / 0.08); border: 1px solid oklch(0.95 0.01 175 / 0.12); border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.75rem; text-align: center; } .ds-hero-rating-number { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.98 0.005 175); } .ds-hero-rating-stars { color: oklch(0.72 0.15 80); font-size: 1.1rem; letter-spacing: 2px; margin: 0.4rem 0; } .ds-hero-rating-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: oklch(0.90 0.01 175); opacity: 0.6; }

narrative.overview:
A design system rooted in what the shop sells. Copper is warm, conductive, essential. Every element serves a purpose, just like every wire in a well-built circuit. The system trades decoration for trust: a 4.9 rating and a clear phone number beat any animation.

The palette splits between two worlds. Deep Shop Teal wraps the hero and contact sections in the authority of a well-run establishment. Warm Cream fills the product and content sections with the approachability of a well-lit showroom. Sitamarhi Gold threads through as the conductive accent, the color of action, appearing only on CTAs, stars, and badges where it means "call this number" or "this is trustworthy."

The system is bilingual by nature, not by afterthought. Bricolage Grotesque carries English headlines with shopfront confidence. Mukta renders Hindi with equal weight and natural cadence. Neither is decorative. Both are load-bearing.
keyCharacteristics: Pill-shaped buttons you want to press, cards that lift on hover
Flat surfaces at rest, shadows only on interaction
Two-tone structure: dark hero/contact bookending light content sections
Touch targets at 44px minimum, high contrast for outdoor phone screens
Motion that respects slow connections and budget devices

rules.name: The Conductor Rule
rules.body: Sitamarhi Gold is the accent. It appears on CTAs, star ratings, and trust signals. If it shows up on more than 10% of a light surface, the system has lost its restraint.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral tints toward hue 80 (warm amber axis) or hue 55 (warm brown axis). No pure grays. A gray that could exist on any website has no place here.

rules.name: The Bilingual Weight Rule
rules.body: Hindi text always appears at the same or lower visual weight than its English counterpart. Hindi subtitles use lighter weight or reduced opacity (0.55 to 0.75). Never let Hindi visually overpower English in the same section.

rules.name: The Scale Ratio Rule
rules.body: Between any two consecutive type steps, the size ratio is at least 1.25. Flat type scales undermine the shopfront confidence.

rules.name: The Earned Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are earned through interaction, not given by default. A resting card has no shadow. A hovered card earns one. If a shadow appears without a user action, it was free and therefore meaningless.

dos: Keep Sitamarhi Gold to CTAs, stars, and trust signals. If it appears on more than 10% of a light surface, reduce.
Pair Hindi and English in every section. 'What We Offer / हमारे उत्पाद' is the pattern, not a separate Hindi section.
Use 44px minimum touch targets on every interactive element.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Fade-in animations become instant.
Tint every neutral toward hue 80 or hue 55. No pure grays.
Use OKLCH for all color definitions.
Cap body text at 65 to 75ch max-width.
donts: Don't use purple gradients, glassmorphism, or SaaS landing-page cliches.
Don't use heavy animations or effects that slow down on budget phones.
Don't create English-only or Hindi-only sections.
Don't over-design in a way that feels foreign to Sitamarhi.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't add shadows to resting state elements.
